items.title: Solana flips $90 support – SOL’s rally to $100 possible ONLY IF…
items.whyYouShouldCare: Solana's ability to maintain above the $90 support level is crucial for potential upward momentum towards $100, impacting investor sentiment and market positioning.

items.title: Bitcoin briefly tops $74,000 as ether, sol, ada gains as much as 6% in Monday surge
items.whyYouShouldCare: The recent surge in Bitcoin, along with gains in Solana and other altcoins, indicates increased market activity, which could enhance liquidity and ecosystem engagement.

items.title: Ether surges 10%, leading crypto rebound as ETF demand, Bitmine buying pick up
items.whyYouShouldCare: Ether's significant rebound signals a broader recovery in the crypto market, which may positively influence Solana's performance and investor interest.
